mnemonics.title: Fossil Fuel Formation
mnemonics.content: **C**arbon-based **O**rganisms **A**ccumulated **L**ong ago. (Spells COAL, the process for all fossils)

mnemonics.title: Renewable Energy Sources
mnemonics.content: **S**ome **B**oys **H**ave **G**reat **W**its **O**nly **T**uesdays. (Solar, Biomass, Hydro, Geothermal, Wind, Ocean, Tidal)
